codeReview.summary: The `werk init` command implementation is thorough and well-tested. The code correctly handles local vs global workspace initialization, maintains idempotency by checking existing workspace state, produces both human-readable and JSON output, and includes comprehensive error handling. All 13 integration tests pass, covering the expected behavior items from VAL-INIT-001 through VAL-INIT-003.

summary: Feature foundation-init passes review. The implementation correctly creates .werk/sd.db locally or ~/.werk/sd.db with --global, is idempotent (preserves existing data on re-init), handles permission errors gracefully, and produces proper JSON output with --json. All 13 integration tests cover the expected behaviors including basic init, global init, idempotency, permission errors, JSON output, and color control. No blocking or non-blocking issues identified.
